existing_features.title: Add a prominent 'Install App' button in the application UI (e.g., in the Header component alongside existing navigation controls) that triggers the PWA installation prompt. The button should use the existing `pwaUtils.ts` install prompt utilities and the `PWAInstallPrompt.tsx` component logic. The button must: (1) only be visible when the app is not already running in standalone/installed mode, (2) handle iOS (show install instructions), Android, and desktop flows appropriately, (3) display a platform-appropriate label such as 'Install App' or 'Add to Home Screen', and (4) be styled consistently with the existing neon dark theme.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add a button in the app to prompt/force PWA installation so it can be used without a browser
